headline: A Look At Rollins (ROL) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Rollins stock performance snapshot Rollins (ROL) has been on many investors’ watchlists after a month return of about a 10% decline and a past 3 months return of roughly a 9% decline, prompting closer attention to the underlying business trends. The company closed at US$53.93, with a market cap of about US$25.8b, and operates a pest and wildlife control business that generated US$3.76b in revenue and US$526.71m in net income across its most recent reporting period. See our latest analysis for...
